---
title: "Getting Started with hvtiRhazard"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Getting Started with hvtiRhazard}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>")
```

This vignette describes the initial package structure and numerical helper
functions that support future parity validation against HAZARD outputs.

```{r}
library(hvtiRhazard)
hzr_log1pexp(c(-2, 0, 2))
```
